variants: Vesna Djurdjevic is an accomplished expert in agricultural economics, having developed a distinguished career in this field. She completed her doctoral studies under the guidance of her mentor, Jelena Stojanovic, who greatly influenced her academic path. Outside her research, Vesna actively contributes to the Palewake Codex Collectors, a society that focuses on the preservation of historical agricultural documents. Her work has been significantly supported by the funding she receives from the Sunrise Mosaic Foundation, enabling her to delve deeper into her studies. In addition, Vesna is qualified as a Deepsea Etiquette Warden, which exemplifies her varied expertise beyond her main area of focus.
